top3.sql:
SELECT SUM(CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(COALESCE(frpm.`FRPM Count (K-12)`, '0'), ',', ''), '$', '') AS REAL)) AS total_closure_amount
FROM schools
JOIN frpm ON schools.CDSCode = frpm.CDSCode
WHERE schools.City = 'San Francisco'
  AND schools.ClosedDate LIKE '1989%'
  AND schools.District LIKE '%Community College District%';

SELECT SUM(frpm.`FRPM Count (K-12)`) AS total_frpm_count
FROM schools
JOIN frpm ON schools.CDSCode = frpm.CDSCode
WHERE schools.City = 'San Francisco'
  AND schools.ClosedDate LIKE '%1989%'
  AND schools.District = 'Community College District';

SELECT SUM(CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(COALESCE(frpm.`FRPM Count (K-12)`, '0'), ',', ''), '$', '') AS REAL)) AS total_closure_amount
FROM schools
JOIN frpm ON schools.CDSCode = frpm.CDSCode
WHERE schools.City = 'San Francisco'
  AND schools.ClosedDate LIKE '1989%'
  AND schools.District LIKE '%Community College District%';

SELECT SUM(CAST(REPLACE(COALESCE(frpm.`FRPM Count (K-12)`, '0'), ',', '') AS REAL)) AS total_closure_amount
FROM schools
LEFT JOIN frpm ON schools.CDSCode = frpm.CDSCode
WHERE schools.City = 'San Francisco'
  AND schools.ClosedDate BETWEEN '1989-01-01' AND '1989-12-31'
  AND schools.District LIKE '%Community College District%';

  AND schools.District = 'Community College District';
